title: vernonia muelleri subsp. integra
intro: Vernonia muelleri subsp. integra is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its distinctive purple flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vernonia muelleri subsp. integra include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some cultures also using the plant in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
